subject: WM-0056 ready for review
body: Repaired checkpoint hash prefix stability, made scenario.start primary seed 46 authoritative while preserving requestedSeed metadata, derived terminal lane/M4 counters from owner stores, updated regression coverage/report/docs, and reran typecheck, focused Vitest, 20000/12000 sim runs, taskctl validate, git diff --check, and pnpm quality.
